_note: Curated from pylint-odoo v9.x for Odoo v18. v18 breaking changes: `group_operator` renamed to `aggregator`, `--longpolling-port` removed (use `--gevent-port`), `name_get()` removed, `read_group()` signature changed, `<list>` preferred over `<tree>` in v18+. Merged with live-extracted rules when odoo_source_root provided.

rules.message: Manifest file is missing required key `name`.
Manifest file is missing required key `version`.
Manifest file is missing recommended key `author`.
Manifest file is missing recommended key `license`.
Manifest file `installable` key should be a boolean.
`@api.multi` is removed in v18 — use plain method with `for rec in self:` loop.
`@api.one` is removed in v18.
New model class is missing `_name` attribute.
`_inherit` without `_name` creates extension — ensure this is intentional.
ir.model.access entry missing from security CSV — model may be inaccessible.
XML id reference does not match any declared id in the module or its dependencies.
Translation string uses positional `%s` formatting — use named `%(name)s` or lazy format.
Translatable string concatenation — do not split translatable strings across `+` operators.
File declared in manifest `data` list does not exist.
SQL injection risk: `cr.execute` called with string interpolation.
Built-in dynamic expression interpreter used with external input — use `odoo.tools.safe_eval` instead.
`sudo()` called without restricting scope — avoid broad `sudo()` for entire CRUD operations.
Hardcoded database ID used — use `env.ref()` instead.
Hardcoded company or currency ID — use `self.env.company` or `self.env.user.company_id`.
`_rec_name` field not present in model fields.
`copy()` override does not call `super()`.
`write()` override does not call `super()` — record changes may not be persisted.
`create()` override does not call `super()`.
`unlink()` override does not call `super()`.
`invalidate_cache()` removed — use `flush_recordset()` or `invalidate_recordset()`.
`track_visibility` field attribute renamed to `tracking` in v16+.
`attrs` attribute in XML view removed — use Python-domain `invisible`/`required`/`readonly` directly.
`states` attribute in XML view removed — use `invisible` domain expression instead.
N+1 ORM query in loop: `browse()` or `search()` called inside a `for` loop over records.
Computed field missing `@api.depends` decorator — will never be recomputed automatically.
`search()` method override must return a recordset and call `super()`.
Many2one field missing `ondelete` parameter — defaults to 'set null' which may leave orphan references.
`digits=(16, 2)` tuple format deprecated — use a precision field name string.
`copy=True` set on a field with a unique SQL constraint — duplication will fail.
`default_get()` override does not call `super()` — default values from other modules will be lost.
`_sql_constraints` entry message is not wrapped in `_()` for translation.
`fields.Html` field without `sanitize=True` may allow XSS — verify sanitization is intentional.
`_order` attribute references a field that does not exist in the model.
Static assets declared via `qweb` key — use `assets` key with bundle names in v18.
XPath `position='replace'` removes the target element entirely — verify this is intentional.
View inheritance without `inherit_id` — `<record model='ir.ui.view'>` missing `inherit_id` field.
`<tree>` view tag used in v18+ — prefer `<list>` tag.
rules.fix_template: Rename `<tree>` to `<list>` in list view XML definitions.

rules.message: String formatting used in UserError/ValidationError — use lazy args or named placeholders.
`name_get()` is removed in v18 — use `_compute_display_name()` instead.
`group_operator` field attribute renamed to `aggregator` in v18.
`read_group()` method signature changed in v18 — `fields` parameter now required, `lazy` parameter removed.
rules.fix_template: Update `read_group(domain, fields, groupby)` — `lazy` kwarg no longer accepted.

rules.message: `--longpolling-port` CLI flag removed in v18 — use `--gevent-port` instead.
`_sql_constraints` entry uses invalid constraint type or malformed tuple.
Unexpected `var`. Use `let` or `const` instead.
Unexpected `console` statement in production JS.
Reference to undeclared variable.
Variable declared but never used.
OWL template references a component not imported.
Blind exception: do not catch `Exception` without re-raising or logging.
Line too long (exceeds max line length).
Import block is unsorted or has wrong grouping.
Module imported but unused.
Use modern Python syntax (pyupgrade rules).
